name: Totentanz Club Enhanced
description: WELCOME BACK TO HELL! While Maelstorm Crimes are soaring, so is V on their way up to the Newly Enhanced Club! Fitted with Red Lights to match the Gangs Theme, Data Screens displaying the Gangs Illicit activities on the Black Market and even a MAXXED OUT Club Vibe, Thanks to the BURNING Passion of DJ Tinnitus endorsing the Club Renovations!
